description_long: This is a single low-cut, lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel. The upper is made of dark, matte leather or synthetic material, featuring subtle decorative perforations and stitching along the sides and toe cap. The laces are black and threaded through metal eyelets, with a standard criss-cross pattern. The sole is a contrasting light brown color, likely made of rubber, and appears moderately thick for comfort and durability. The interior is padded, suggesting comfort for extended wear, and the overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban environments. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A dark, lace-up low-cut shoe with a rounded toe, decorative stitching, and a light brown rubber sole. The design is utilitarian and stylish, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, laces, and subtle perforations on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the decorative stitching, perforations, and the full profile of the light brown sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel, padded collar, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing stitching, perforations, and the sole profile.
